transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: It treats the reader as trapped rather than weak and targets desire through changed beliefs, but uses disgust, catastrophic health rhetoric, sweeping biological claims, unverifiable success assertions, and rigid compliance demands.
paraphrased_evidence.B: It offers the same blame-relieving cognitive approach and rejects ongoing restraint, while relying on frightening disease scenarios, categorical nutrition and addiction claims, unsupported efficacy claims, and an absolute instructional posture.

parsed.generic_mechanism: No differential mechanism is supported because identical messaging activates the same belief-reframing, threat, and compliance processes in both blocks.
